name: Kumwell Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Kumwell Corporation Public Company Limited engages in the production and distribution of electrical equipment, graphite molds, metal powders, and ground wires in Thailand and internationally. The company provides grounding systems comprising exothermic welding products, ground rod and accessories, grounding components, MEG, meters, and concrete inspection kit; and lightning protection systems comprising lighting protection component, conductors, cables, and air terminals. It also offers surge protective devices for low voltage power supply systems, IT components and equipment, data/signal line protection; lightning warning system; smart lightning management system for digital smart plant, smart building, smart home and smart network centric operation; and electric arc protection systems. It serves the electricity, industrial, transportation, telecommunication, and building sectors. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
